recommendations.title: Troop Beverly Hills
recommendations.overview: A Beverly Hills housewife in the middle of a divorce tries to find focus in her life by taking over her daughter's Wilderness Girls troop.

recommendations.title: Slums of Beverly Hills
recommendations.overview: In 1976, a lower-middle-class teenager struggles to cope living with her neurotic family of nomads on the outskirts of Beverly Hills.

recommendations.title: From Prada to Nada
recommendations.overview: Two spoiled Beverly Hills sisters who have been left penniless after their father's sudden death are forced to move in with their estranged aunt in East Los Angeles.

recommendations.title: California Suite
recommendations.overview: The misadventures of four groups of guests at the Beverly Hills Hotel.

recommendations.title: Beverly Hills Cop: Axel F
recommendations.overview: Forty years after his unforgettable first case in Beverly Hills, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to do what he does best: solve crimes and cause chaos.

recommendations.title: Abracadabra
recommendations.overview: A housewife struggles with her husband after he is possessed by a ghost.

recommendations.title: The Taming of the Shrewd
recommendations.overview: When a heartbroken scientist moves back home to start over, her scheming brother hires a handsome stranger to convince her to sell their land.

recommendations.title: Beverly Hills Cop
recommendations.overview: Fast-talking, quick-thinking Detroit street cop Axel Foley has bent more than a few rules and regs in his time, but when his best friend is murdered, he heads to sunny Beverly Hills to work the case like only he can.

recommendations.title: Es por su bien
recommendations.overview: Horrified by the new girlfriends of their respective sons, three sisters-in-law – Clara, a socialite, Matis, a widowed professional, and Nena, a naive housewife – make an alliance to get rid of their undesirable daughters-in-law.

recommendations.title: The Devil Wears Prada
recommendations.overview: A young woman from the Midwest gets more than she bargained for when she moves to New York to become a writer and ends up as the assistant to the tyrannical, larger-than-life editor-in-chief of a major fashion magazine.
